data.title: Wayfinder (PROMPT) broke through 0.6USDT in the short term and is now trading at 0.608USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that Wayfinder (PROMPT) once broke through 0.6 USDT in the short term and is now at 0.608USDT, setting a new record high.

data.title: Bitcoin whales absorb market pressure, but is a parabolic run REALLY coming?
data.description:
Bitcoin rose by 11% to $83,500, driven by whales and long-term holders.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitcoin-whales-absorb-market-pressure-but-is-a-parabolic-run-really-coming/

data.title: The transaction volume of USD1, the US dollar stablecoin launched by WLFI, has exceeded 44.91 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to CoinGecko data, the transaction volume of USD1, the US dollar stablecoin launched by Trump's crypto project WLFI, has exceeded 44.91 million US dollars. 
Earlier news, DWF Labs has begun to add USD1 liquidity on Ethereum and BSC chains.

data.title: Billionaire Draper Doubles Down on Bullish Outlook for Bitcoin, Sends Message to Naysayers
data.description:
Billionaire Tim Draper has taken to X to remind market onlookers of his position on unconventional emerging technologies like artificial intelligence and cryptos.
source: https://zycrypto.com/billionaire-draper-doubles-down-on-bullish-outlook-for-bitcoin-sends-message-to-naysayers/

data.title: Ton coin Price Prediction: Indicators Point To Recovery
data.description:

data.title: Four Indian police officers under investigation for tampering with seized digital assets
data.description:
Four Indian police officers are now under investigation for tampering with digital assets and locked up in evidence. According to police sources, the four officers attached to the Bengaluru Central Crime Branch (CCB) are now being investigated by the police after the Karnataka government granted the sanction. According to reports, the evidence the former Indian […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/indian-police-investigation-digital-assets/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 600 USDT with a 2.51% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 12, 2025, 15:37 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 600.090027 USDT, with a narrowed 2.51% increase in 24 hours.
